title: Rain Remover
description: This mod removes particles in the game such as raindrops and snowflakes. This can give a couple of fps for weak computers, as well as improve gameplay
body:
Rain Remove is a lightweight client-side Fabric mod that removes weather visuals to improve performance and visibility.  
It disables rain and snow rendering, and blocks raindrop/snowflake particles.  
This can reduce FPS drops on weaker PCs, make combat and exploration clearer, and avoid visual issues with some shader packs.  
 
No gameplay mechanics are changed.
